title: astragalus nelsonianus
intro: Astragalus nelsonianus, also known as Nelson's milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, native to the western United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus nelsonianus are said to include improving immune function, reducing fatigue, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, Astragalus nelsonianus is often dried and used as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
